Publish.LongDescription:
### Important Update: New Presets
This update introduces a new presets designed to achieve a **perceptually neutral** baseline for targeted LUTs in the pack. Presets have descriptive suffixes so use them with same suffix LUT files. Legacy Filmstock preset has been updated but its only average between D60 presets. All presets have closely matching tonal range, and they have all been tuned to be as close as possible to be perceptually neutral in midtones, yet still provide different white balance indicated by suffix. New presets will automatically sync to your Lumina folder upon game relaunch.
By emulating the characteristics of classic Kodak and Fujifilm film stocks, this pack delivers richer colours, enhanced contrast, saturation roll off.
### Quick Start & Usage: 1. Load your save game and open the Lumina menu and go to the first tab. 2. Import the Filmstock preset by typing **Dam Filmstock FJ D55** 3. Press **IMPORT PRESET** 4. Tick **ENABLE LUMINA VOLUME** else nothing will apply either preset or LUT's 5. Navigate to the "Tonemapping" tab (sun inside a square). 6. Set the **Tonemapping Mode** to **External** 7. Choose **Tonemapping Texture** from the list **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55** 8. Ensure LUT Contribution is set to **1** else you will have white and saturation clipping. Use adjustments in the last tab instead to fine-tune later. 9. Click **Load LUT**
### Extra Notes: - **LUT** files remain unchanged. - **Legacy Content:** The original "Filmstock" and "Filmstock FJ D55 A" presets are now considered legacy. For the best experience, use new targeted presets. - **Latitude Longitude:** Preset sets it to the equator but if you were not using lumina to set it up, but Time & Weather anarchy there is no effect afaik. - **SSGI:** presets will not force it. - **SSAO:** presets will turn it on, and only options to control it further are inside Lumina. - **Contact Shadows:** presets will turn them off, I do not recommend them, only way to set them correctly without artefacts renders them redundant with SSAO. - **Road Textures:** Presets will turn them on, and change the settings, work well with default Lumina texture replacement.
### LUT List: - **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D55** - **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D60** - **Dam_Filmstock_FJ_D65** - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D55** - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D60** - **Dam_Filmstock_KD_D65**
### Preset List: - **Filmstock** (Updated: Avg. between Dam Filmstock FJ D60 and Dam Filmstock KD D60, use for preview only) - **Filmstock FJ D55 A** (Removed) - **Jukka Filmstock FJ D55** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock FJ D55** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock FJ D60** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock FJ D65** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock KD D55** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock KD D60** (Recommended) - **Dam Filmstock KD D65** (Recommended)
### Special Thanks **Nyoko** **Jukka (Jen1)**
Publish.ChangeLog: - Updated road wear default settings to work well with default Lumina texture replacement
